testcase.name: S2.1 | Export with search filter active
testcase.error:
[chromium] › story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:64:1 › S2.1 | Export with search filter active ────
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="subscription-list"]') to be visible
80 | 81 | // Wait for subscriptions to load > 82 | await page.waitForSelector('[data-testid="subscription-list"]', { timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 83 | 84 | // Get initial subscription count (all subscriptions) 85 | const allSubscriptions = await page.locator('[data-testid="subscription-item"]').count(); at C:\Users\Lester Tuazon\Documents\GitHub\BMad-subscription-tracker\subscription-tracker\tests\e2e\story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:82:14
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-002-export-filtered--cb93a-t-with-search-filter-active-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-002-export-filtered--cb93a-t-with-search-filter-active-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\story-002-export-filtered--cb93a-t-with-search-filter-active-chromium\error-context.md
attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\story-002-export-filtered--cb93a-t-with-search-filter-active-chromium\trace.zip Usage:
npx playwright show-trace ..\..\test-results\story-002-export-filtered--cb93a-t-with-search-filter-active-chromium\trace.zip
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: S2.4 | Export with no matches shows friendly message
testcase.error:
[chromium] › story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:318:1 › S2.4 | Export with no matches shows friendly message
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="subscription-list"]') to be visible
333 | 334 | // Wait for subscriptions > 335 | await page.waitForSelector('[data-testid="subscription-list"]', { timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 336 | 337 | // Action: Apply search that matches nothing 338 | const searchInput = page.locator('input#searchbar-input'); at C:\Users\Lester Tuazon\Documents\GitHub\BMad-subscription-tracker\subscription-tracker\tests\e2e\story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:335:14

testcase.name: S2.10 | Performance baseline: export 500+ filtered rows in <2 seconds
testcase.error:
[chromium] › story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:378:1 › S2.10 | Performance baseline: export 500+ filtered rows in <2 seconds
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 5000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="subscription-list"]') to be visible
393 | 394 | // Wait for subscriptions > 395 | await page.waitForSelector('[data-testid="subscription-list"]', { timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 396 | 397 | // Verify we have enough subscriptions to test with 398 | const subscriptionCount = await page.locator('[data-testid="subscription-item"]').count(); at C:\Users\Lester Tuazon\Documents\GitHub\BMad-subscription-tracker\subscription-tracker\tests\e2e\story-002-export-filtered.spec.ts:395:14
